﻿THE SPARTA LAUNCH

Welcome to the Sparta Launch Bonus. The Sparta Launch is all about selling very high-priced, small-group workshops or retreats via email.

1 The Sparta Launch [14 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn the step-by-step details of how to do a Sparta Launch. It includes a PDF download with several case studies.

2 The Sparta Panel at LaunchCon [51 minutes]
This bonus video from LaunchCon gives you an inside look at how to use the Sparta Launch from our Sparta Panel of Jeff's Platinum Plus mastermind members, Erico Rocha, Sebastien Night, and Will Hamilton.
